queries.question: Could you show me the IDs of the luggage trolleys located at the departure hall and the ids of the porters located there?
queries.sql:
SELECT Luggage_trolleys.TrolleyID as ID
FROM Available_locations JOIN Luggage_trolleys ON Available_locations.id = Luggage_trolleys.availableLocation
WHERE Available_locations.location = "Departure Hall"
UNION
SELECT Porters.PorterID as ID
FROM Available_locations JOIN Porters ON Available_locations.id = Porters.availableLocation
WHERE Available_locations.location = "Departure Hall"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?available_locations a :Available_locations .
    ?luggage_trolleys a :Luggage_trolleys .
    ?luggage_trolleys p:hasAvailable_locations ?available_locations .
    ?luggage_trolleys p:trolleyID ?trolleyid .
    ?available_locations p:location ?location_f .
    FILTER(STR(?location_f) = "Departure Hall")
    BIND(?trolleyid AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?available_locations a :Available_locations .
    ?porters a :Porters .
    ?porters p:hasAvailable_locations ?available_locations .
    ?porters p:porterID ?porterid .
    ?available_locations p:location ?location_f .
    FILTER(STR(?location_f) = "Departure Hall")
    BIND(?porterid AS ?o0)
  }
}

SELECT Luggage_trolleys.TrolleyID as ID
